title: Client Logos

fields.label: Kicker Text
fields.name: kicker_text
fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the logos. Example: "Trusted by brands that take digital seriously"
fields.default_value: Trusted by brands that take digital seriously
fields.placeholder: Trusted by brands that take digital seriously

fields.label: Client Logos
fields.name: logos
fields.instructions: Add client logos in the order they should appear in the marquee. Logos are automatically scrolled. Recommended image: 300×160px transparent PNG or SVG.

sub_fields.label: Logo Image
sub_fields.name: logo_image
sub_fields.instructions: Client logo. Transparent PNG or SVG recommended. Max size: 300×160px.

sub_fields.label: Client Name
sub_fields.name: logo_name
sub_fields.instructions: Client or brand name — used as the image alt text.

sub_fields.label: Website URL
sub_fields.name: logo_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If set, the logo becomes a link to the client's website.

description: Fields for the Client Logos marquee block.
